lines.en: Helen, let us play badminton in the park!
lines.zh: Helen，我们去公园打羽毛球吧！

lines.en: Sure! I brought my rackets and a birdie.
lines.zh: 好啊！我带了球拍和羽毛球。

lines.en: Here you go! That went too high.
It is OK. I got it! Here it comes back.
lines.zh: 没关系。我接到了！打回去了。

lines.en: Nice one! We had a long rally.
lines.zh: 好球！我们打了好几个来回。

lines.en: My arm is getting tired. Let us take a break.
lines.zh: 我的手臂有点累了。我们休息一下吧。

lines.en: Good idea. Do you want some water?
Yes, please. That was a good game!
lines.zh: 好的，谢谢。这局打得真好！
